JellyRequest Configuration

Configure your TMDB, Radarr, and Sonarr settings for content requests.

TMDB Configuration

Get your API key from TMDB

Radarr Configuration (Movies)

The full URL to your Radarr instance
Find this in Radarr Settings > General > Security
Default quality profile for new movie requests
Default root folder for new movie requests

Sonarr Configuration (TV Shows)

The full URL to your Sonarr instance
Find this in Sonarr Settings > General > Security
Default quality profile for new TV show requests
Default root folder for new TV show requests

User Permissions

If unchecked, only administrators can make requests
Maximum number of active requests per user

Advanced Settings

How often to check Radarr/Sonarr for request status updates
Show notifications when requests are completed
